heroHeadline: Seasonal Comfort Food, Made Fresh Daily
heroSubheadline: A neighborhood kitchen serving locally sourced dishes in a warm, welcoming space.
aboutSection:
Terra & Sage started as a farmers-market stall and grew into Portland's favorite neighborhood kitchen. We still cook the way we always have — from scratch, with ingredients we're proud of.

Our menu changes with the seasons, built around what local farms are harvesting that week. Nothing frozen, nothing rushed.

Whether you're grabbing lunch, planning a dinner, or catering an event, we'd love to feed you like family.

services.name: Dine-In
services.description: A cozy, welcoming room and a menu that changes with the season.

services.name: Takeout
services.description: All your favorites, packed fresh and ready to go.

services.name: Catering
services.description: Thoughtful spreads for offices, parties, and celebrations.

services.name: Private Events
services.description: Buy out the room for an unforgettable gathering.

services.name: Weekend Brunch
services.description: Griddle classics and morning cocktails every Saturday and Sunday.

services.name: Bakery Counter
services.description: House-made breads and pastries baked every morning.

testimonials.text: Everything tastes like it was made with real care. Our new weekend spot.
testimonials.author: Ben C.

testimonials.text: Catered our office lunch and the whole team is still talking about it.
testimonials.author: Rachel M.

testimonials.text: Cozy room, incredible food, genuinely kind staff. Ten out of ten.
testimonials.author: Diego F.

metaTitle: Terra & Sage Kitchen — Restaurant in Portland, OR
metaDescription: Seasonal, locally sourced comfort food in Portland, OR. Dine-in, takeout, and catering. Call to reserve a table or place an order.
